original text: with great sadness that announce passing beloved mother grandmother Elly Sunday, January 2008, years. will welcomed with open arms late Pete, passed away 1992, late husband Peter, passed away 1998. will fondly remembered sadly missed daughters Miriam Jeanette, sons-in-law Richard Morad, grandchildren Mitchell, Lindsey, Erik, Troy, Cameron Stevan. will also missed family British Columbia Netherlands. Wherever Elly lived, became part community, always many wonderful friends. Through caring others, Elly touched lives knew her. door always open. Elly full life, although wish could have more years with her. family would like thank Linda Fong, Sharon Paul, R.N., staff Rosedale Hospice their dedication support. Elly wish have formal service memory. such, would like family friends privately remember Elly, Sunday, January 2008 4:00 P.M. with tea. Please take moment, your quietly reflect Elly you. wish your reflections will forwarded family ccl@hffs.com, subject heading: Elisabeth Roosmalen.
